title: The Important Role That Black Communities Play In Addressing Climate Change
description:
Did you know that Black communities and organizations are serving as climate innovation hubs that provide clean energy, clean water, affordable green housing, and healthy food? It’s clear that an urgent need exists to make transparent the climate, environmental, and clean energy actions that are underway from Black communities. Arising ... [continued]

The post The Important Role That Black Communities Play In Addressing Climate Change appeared first on CleanTechnica.
